title: Bitter Chewy Mexican Beef Tacos
description: A midnight-craving Mexican dish featuring bitter and chewy beef, caramelized onions, and a tangy chimichurri sauce. This nut-free-friendly recipe is perfect for a late-night snack or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together parsley, oregano, red wine vinegar, lime juice, and garlic to make the chimichurri sauce.
Season the flank steak with salt and black pepper.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
In a large skillet, caramelize the onions over medium-low heat for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by slicing the grilled steak into thin strips and serving it with caramelized onions, chimichurri sauce, and warm tortillas.
